About

The Internet's
Nostalgia HQ

I Remember That Shit is a nostalgia-driven content brand celebrating the movies, music, toys, TV shows, and cultural moments that defined the 80s, 90s, and early 2000s.

Founded and run by a professional designer and illustrator with 15+ years of experience — every post is crafted to spark genuine emotional connection, not just clicks.

📸 @irememberthatshit

Film & TV Anniversaries Music Throwbacks 90s Toys & Games Nostalgia Polls Celebrity Birthdays Forgotten Snacks Classic Cartoons Retro Tech Viral Throwbacks Pop Culture Milestones

Why partner

Your Brand.
Their Memory.

Nostalgia is one of the most powerful emotional triggers in marketing. This audience doesn't just scroll — they stop, they feel something, and they share it.

Brands that show up authentically in this space earn trust and affinity that no ad spend can replicate.

🎯

Hyper-targeted reach

Millennials + elder Gen Z with real spending power, united by shared cultural memory.

💬

Above-avg engagement

Comments, shares, and saves far above industry standard. People stop and feel something.

🎨

Built-in creative talent

15+ years in design. Custom branded content created in-house — no agency markup.

🔥

Trust at scale

Over 1 million followers who chose this page. Not paid traffic — real fans who keep coming back.

Ideal brand fit includes:

Streaming services · Snack & beverage brands · Apparel · Gaming · Collectibles · Entertainment · Retail nostalgia plays
